samples.label: Path A — annual audit document request

submission.subject: Documents needed for annual vendor compliance audit FY2026
submission.description: Hi Compliance team, we received the audit notice for FY2026. Could you confirm the exact list of documents we need to upload on the portal (ISO certs, GST returns, MSME, EPF/ESIC challans), the upload deadline, and what happens if we miss the cut-off date?

samples.label: Path B — niche labour-law clarification (likely KB miss)

submission.subject: Applicability of Maharashtra Shops and Establishments rules to our subcontractors
submission.description: We have engaged sub-contractors across two new sites in Pune. Could compliance confirm whether the Maharashtra Shops and Establishments Act amendments dated Jan 2026 require us to register each site separately, or if a master registration on our parent entity is sufficient for the upcoming audit?
